description: Perform a digital forensics audit on the server access log file at '~/evidence/server_access_logs.txt' by verifying its integrity against the Chain of Custody record stored in ArkCase (admin/ArkCase1234!). Identify the relevant case using the ID found in '~/case_to_audit.txt'. Compare the SHA256 hash of the local file with the recorded hash found in the case notes. Generate an audit report at '~/evidence_audit_report.txt' containing the Case Number, Filename, Recorded Hash, Current Hash, and Status (INTACT or COMPROMISED).
